qa_pairs.question: How can users access Ansys programs in graphical mode on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can run Ansys programs in graphical mode by clicking on either OnDemand or Jupyterhub desktop links, which are available for various Alliance clusters.

qa_pairs.question: Which Alliance clusters provide graphical access to Ansys programs, and what are their respective URLs?
qa_pairs.answer: Graphical access to Ansys programs is available on NIBI via OnDemand at `https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca`, on FIR via Jupyterhub at `https://jupyterhub.fir.alliancecan.ca`, on RORQUAL via Jupyterhub at `https://jupyterhub.rorqual.alliancecan.ca`, on NARVAL via Jupyterhub at `https://jupyterhub.narval.alliancecan.ca/`, and on TRILLIUM via OnDemand at `https://ondemand.scinet.utoronto.ca`.
